titleStmt.title: SII 9.453: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 453. (A.R. No. 24 of 1904.) ON A ROCK NEAR THE KAPILASRAMA AT NIMBAPUR, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1372, Pramāthi, Pausha, ba. 7, Śukravāra corresponding to A.D. 1450 December 25, Friday. It gives the genealogy of the Vijayanagara kings from Saṅgama down to Prauḍhadēva-Mahārāya who was ruling from Vijayanagara. It records that, under the orders of the king, Rāyapaṇṇayya founded a village called Sōmalāpura and that the king erected a temple, a lamp-pillar, and a Sandhyā-maṇḍapa and consecrated in the temple the god Saumya-Sōmēśvara. He is also stated to have made a gift of Kariyahaḷḷi for the service of the god and placed it in charge of Nāgaṇṇayya, son of Huligere Maṅgaṇṇa-Ayya. The writer was Vīraṇa, son of Muddaṇāchārya. The record is engraved in Nāgarī characters and Sanskrit and Kannaḍa languages.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipataye namaḥ . śrīsomeśvarāya namaḥ . nirvighnamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracākhe . trailokyanaga
rāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhave . riṁgannutsaṁgaraṁge nijaradanadhiyā śaṁkarasyottamāṁgādākarṣānniṁdulekhāṁ pitari
nijaradasteyamāropayaṁśca . mātuḥ protsāhayaṁtyāḥ smitaśucivadanaṁ vīkṣamāṇaḥ sahāsaṁ bālo vātsalyabhūmiḥ kalayatu
mudito maṁgaḷānyekadaṁtaḥ . Avyādvaḥ prathamaḥ potrī sarasāmudvahanrasāṁ . nijāṁgasaṁgasaṁjātasāṁdrasvedodayāmiva . Asti svastimadudayo
muktāmayasūtisaṁbhavanmahimā . Anaṁtyamūlanilayaḥ suparvamahito yadorvaro vaṁśaḥ . Abhūttatra kule śrīmānabhaṁguraguṇodayaḥ . A
pāstaduritāsaṁgasaṁgamo nāma bhūpatiḥ . tasmādajāyata nijāyatakhaḍgadhārāsaṁpātapāṭitaparaḥ śatavairisaṁghaḥ lo
ke viśeṣakavilāsakarairyaśobhiḥ saṁśobhitaḥ kṣititale kila bukkarāyaḥ . Āsīdāsīmabhūmīśa mauhilālitaśāsanaḥ . rājā hariharastasmādyaduvaṁśābdicaṁdramāḥ .
dṛpyanmattadviradakaraṭaścyotaduddāmadānaprāyatpāthaprasṛmarajharījālajaṁbālajanmā . citraṁ vīrapratibhaṭanṛpaprāṁśuvaṁśandahantī nāsyanya
staṁ dahati tṛṇakaṁ yatpratāpānalārciḥ . Āsīdāsīmamahimā himadhāmakīrteḥ sphītaśriyo hariharānnṛpaterudāraḥ . Uddāmavāmanarapālakulābdhimaṁthamaṁthācalaḥ
sthirabhujo bhuvi devarāyaḥ . yatkīrtiḥ pārthivānvayajuṣāṁ pīyūṣavarṣāyatte . saṁgisurāṁganājanamukhe karpūrapūrāyate stenaḥ kairava
tsavakṛtau vitānāyate . digdaṁtāvalidaṁta vihārāyate . tasmādudanvata Iveṁdurudārakīrtirjātaḥ kalāvalivilāsanivā
sabhūmiḥ . jaivātṛkaḥ kalitakīrtikalāpacaṁcaccaṁdrātapo vijayarāyamahīmaheṁdraḥ . tato'jani mahārājo devarāja Ivāparaḥ . sumanassavito jiṣṇuḥ
devarāyadharādhipaḥ . Uddāmadāna dadyāllakṣmīmiha . dyāmiva kīrtirudāravegavihitaḥ bhāgī haṁta
bhujaṁgamau bahuvidhāhyairāvato tadvidhau svaḥ . vinayaḥ śritadharādharāmarāmahārājaṁti sarve mṛgāḥ saṁbhedādu
rvarīkṛta tribhuvanī yatkīrtivipphūrtibhirdātuṁ mahārājñī śacīva namucidviṣaḥ . tayoḥ prācīnapuṇyānāṁ paripa
� devaiḥ māsījjagatītale . yasya
pratāpānalajṛṁbhamāṇajvālājaṭāle bhuvanāṁtarāṁle . paraṁ tamaḥ prāpadanupraveśaṁ pratyarthipṛthvīpatihṛddarīṣu . vikrame vikramādityaṁ bhoge bhojamivāparaṁ . rā
jarājaṁ vitaraṇe rājānaṁ taṁ pracakṣate . rājādhirājastejasvī yo rājaparameśvaraḥ . bhāṣātilaṁghibhūpālabhujaṁgabirudonnataḥ . vairibhūpativetaṁḍacaṁḍakhaṁḍanakesarī . ga
jaughagaṁḍabheruṁḍaḥ gajaughamṛgayāturaḥ . mūrurāyaragaṁḍāṁko pararāyabhayaṁkaraḥ . hiṁdurāyasuratrāṇo vaṁdivargeṇa saṁstutaḥ . śrītuṁgabhadrāparisve nagare vijayādvaye . pitryaṁ tiṁhā
sanaṁ prāpya pālayanpṛthivīmimāṁ . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara . bhāṣege tappuva rāyara gaṁḍa śrīvīrapratāpacakravarti praudadevarāyamahārāyaru sukhasaṁkathāvinoda
diṁ vijayanagarīrājadhāniyalu rājyaṁgaivutaviddalli śrīsaumyasomeśvaradevarali sakala Anupagaḷanu rakṣisabekeṁva kṛpeyiṁ śrī kṣetra hemakūṭa śrīgirikṣetra
caṁdrārkeśvarasamīpadalu tuṁgabhadrādakṣiṇakūlada kumāragiriya Agrahāradalu Adagiriya teṁnāla Ubhayarāda rāyapaṇṇagaḷu ka
svāmige trikālapūje māḍisu pādaseya Ayyaṁṇagaḷige vellavanu nemisalāgi Ayyaṁṇagaḷu rāyarige vihnamāḍi grāmavanu dhāreyanerasi soma
lāpuraveṁdu Āṁ puradalu hostāgi pratiṣṭheyādā saumyasomeśvaradevara śrīkārya cālapurada catuḥsīmeya vivara mūḍalu Īśānyadiśige mojaveṁba basava
mudreyakalliṁdaṁ baḍagadāri deseyalu mallana mede yetadabhāvi mūḍalu pāyaloṇiyiṁ naḍeva heddāriya marana Ottinalu basavanakalla vaḷi
Ā basavanakalliṁ paḍuvaviḍidu mele bhāviya Īśānya muṁde mūḍalu kaṭṭege paḍuvaṇa koṭhārada bāgilu mere Ottinalu
ṇavaterada kalliṁdaṁ baḍagalu teṁgina gujarada dāri gāḍu teṁka naḍeye toṭada baḷiya koṭūriṁ baṁda dāriyiṁ paḍuva muṁtāgi beṭṭada Ottinalu giḍugaḷa kaṭṭida
gaṇa naḍeye mege śāsanakalliṁ baḍagamuṁtāgi mūḍaṇa daṁḍe mereyāgi Ottinalu votti māḍida dāriyiṁ ṇagaḷu
sīme Alliṁda mūḍalu bāgiya podeya holasīme bāviya
śāṁtivaibhava someśvara gopura raṁgamaṁṭapa dīpadānastaṁbha saṁdhyāmaṁṭapa muṁtāda sakala maṁṭapagaḷanu kaṭṭisi svasti śrījayābhyudayaśāli
vāhanaśakavarṣa 1377 neya pramādisaṁvatsarada pauṣa ba 7 śukravāradalu śrīsaumyasomeśvaradevara pratiṣṭeya māḍi Ā devara Amṛtapaḍinaivedyakkāgi rāmappa
ṇagaḷu nirnayamāḍalāgi rāyaru hastināvativaḷitada veṁṭheyada kariyahaḷḷiyalu varaha 12 śrī śrī
vapuravāgi sahiraṇyodakadi dhāreyaneradu tāṁbraśāsanava koṭṭa kereyahaḷḷiya sīmāvivara mūḍalu sīme nāyakanahaḷḷiya grāma
baṁdu baḷiyahaḷḷiya gaḍiṁbadiṁ sīmegaḷa naḍedukoṁḍu baha paṭṭaṇada ḍoṇe Alliṁ kiriya mūḍalu Eriya paḍe
mūḍa Ā muṁde tāgalu haḷḷiya ḷagaṇa gadde śrīmatu devagoḷada maṭhada Ottigeyalu teṁkaṇasīmeyiṁdalu śrī śrīma
śasi salla muṁtāgi beḍiyamallahaḷḷiya bhāgadoḷage sīma haḷḷige hoha heddāriya dharmabeṁceya sīmeyalu
mugguḍḍada hālahaḷḷiya sīmeya baḍagaṇa sīme kuḍadele Alliṁdaṁ mūḍalu sīme gauḍana maga kereya sīme
bhūmigū guppeya sīmeya kopareyahāḷa toṁṭa daṁḍiguppeya ḍeyara kaṭṭe sīmeya bāviya
lu yakaṭṭeya muṁde Ottinalu kapileya bāviya guḍḍa sīmeyāgi naḍeye hāḷanu siṁgenāyakanahaḷḷiya
sīme maduvakāpu Ī kiriyahaḷḷiya catuḥsīme Ī sīmeyoḷaguḷḷa nidhi nikṣepa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi siddha sādhyavaṣṭa
bhoga teja svāmya sahavāgi sakalasuvarṇādāya sahavāgiyū samarpista Ī dharmava kālānukāla sthiravāgi naḍusudakke huligereya maṁ
gaṇṇaAyyagaḷa makkaḷu nāgaṁṇaAyyagaḷa kartara māḍi koṭṭaru Ī dharmavanu pālistavaru vāraṇāsiyalu dalu sahasra kuṭuṁbake sahasra gova dā
na māḍida dharmaphalavanu yaiduvaru Ī dharmake Aḷupidavaru sahasra kuṭuṁba sahasra govugaḷanu vadhisida pāpakke hoharu Ācaṁdrasūrya natvā samya
kkṛtāṁjaliḥ . bhāvinaḥ pārthivān yāce maddharmaṁ pālayaṁtviti . dharmamā dharmarājena bhavet . dānapālanayo
rmadhye dānācchreyo'nupālanam . dānātsvargamavāpnoti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanam . paradattāpahāreṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavet .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yo hareta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyate krimiḥ . sāmānyo'yaṁ dharmaseturnnṛpāṇāṁ kāle kāle pālanīyo bhavadbhiḥ . sarvānetānbhāvi
naḥ pārthivendranbhūyo bhūyo yācate rāmacaṁdraḥ . Ādityacaṁdrāvanalānilau ca dyaurbhūmirāpo hṛdayaṁ yamaśca . Ahaśca rātriśca tathā dvisaṁdhye dharmaśca jānāti nara
sya vṛttam . dānādadharma mitaṁ yat . karakṛtamaparādhaṁ kṣaṁtumarhaṁti saṁtaḥ . Ī śāsanava baradāta muddaṇācāryara maga vīraṇa svasti śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.453 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
